title: lithocarpus atjehensis
intro: Lithocarpus atjehensis, also known as the Sumatran tanbark oak, is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family Fagaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lithocarpus atjehensis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Lithocarpus atjehensis include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
